title: Replying via Monday.com

posts.author: esus (Erwin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

if I add the outlook integration to create new task when there’s a new email coming to Inbox A.

Can I reply the email on monday.com and show the recipient of the reply that the email is coming from InboxA@company.com instead from monday.com domain?

is this possible? if it yes, how do we do this?
